nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 簇蓝鸦
nodes.summary: 簇蓝鸦（Tufted jay，学名 Cyanocorax dickeyi），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联5个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 錫那羅亞州
nodes.summary: 錫那羅亞州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联14种鸟类，包括紫冠雉、Lesser roadrunner、普通潜鸟等14种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 納亞里特州
nodes.summary: 納亞里特州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联7种鸟类，包括Black turnstone、Golden-cheeked woodpecker、White-striped woodcreeper等7种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 杜蘭戈州
nodes.summary: 杜蘭戈州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括蓝喉宝石蜂鸟、庫柏鷹、White-striped woodcreeper等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 墨西哥高原
nodes.summary: 墨西哥高原是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括簇蓝鸦、棕曲嘴鷦鷯、Curve-billed thrasher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 西馬德雷山脈
nodes.summary: 西馬德雷山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括Elegant quail、Lesser roadrunner、瑰丽蜂鸟等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: thumb|right|The tufted jay can be found in pine-oak forests within Sierra Madre Occidental.|alt=An epiphyte-covered oak tree surrounded by pine trees The tufted jay is endemic to Mexico and is only found in a limited range within the Sierra Madre Occidental, in an area of roughly . Within this mountain range, they can be found in eastern Sinaloa, western Durango, and northern Nayarit. This species is most often found at elevations of , but has been found as low as and as high as . The tufted jay inhabits forests throughout its range

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the breeding season, they can commonly be found in ravines near water sources. They can sometimes be found at higher elevations into the Mexican Plateau or areas where logging has occurred

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The primary threat to its survival is habitat destruction due to agricultural expansion and deforestation due to logging and narcotic cultivation

links.label: 受威胁于
